Landry Shamet, Mo Diawara and Jose Alvarado will earn a COMBINED total of $12.4 million next season

​The following individual players will make MORE than $12.5 million next season:

Jock Landale
Jarred Vanderbilt
Sandro Mamukelashvili
Corey Kispert
Josh Green
Dennis Schröder
Obi Toppin
Terance Mann

items.title: The final 2 years of Landry Shamet's 4-year deal with  Knicks are partially guaranteed, league source tells @TheAthletic. In Year 3, $1.6M of his $6.2M salary is guaranteed. In Year 4, $1.7M of his $6.6M salary is GTD. He has a player option in Year 4, as Ian Begley reported.
items.author: Fred Katz
items.body_excerpt: The final 2 years of Landry Shamet's 4-year deal with  Knicks are partially guaranteed, league source tells @TheAthletic. In Year 3, $1.6M of his $6.2M salary is guaranteed. In Year 4, $1.7M of his $6.6M salary is GTD. He has a player option in Year 4, as Ian Begley reported.

items.title: Landry Shamet’s new contract with the New York Knicks is guaranteed for $14.5M (first two years are fully guaranteed, last two years are partially guaranteed), a league source tells @spotrac.com.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Landry Shamet’s new contract with the New York Knicks is guaranteed for $14.5M (first two years are fully guaranteed, last two years are partially guaranteed), a league source tells @spotrac.com.

Shamet also has a player option on the final season.

Well done by Leon and company bringing him back

items.title: Landry Shamet intends to return to the Knicks on a four-year, $24 million deal, league sources confirm to The Athletic. Shamet gets some security and rewarded for being a key part in the Knicks’ title run. I estimated Shamet would come back at 3 years, $18 million. This is the sa
items.author: James L. Edwards III
items.body_excerpt: Landry Shamet intends to return to the Knicks on a four-year, $24 million deal, league sources confirm to The Athletic. Shamet gets some security and rewarded for being a key part in the Knicks’ title run. I estimated Shamet would come back at 3 years, $18 million. This is the same aav.

items.title: The Knicks project to be $8.7 million after re-signing Landry Shamet.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
The Knicks project to be $8.7 million after re-signing Landry Shamet.

They have room to bring back one of him or Mitchell Robinson while staying under the second apron.

They can field the rest of the roster with minimum salaries and find a new backup big man via trade.

items.title: Just in: Free agent guard Landry Shamet intends to sign a new four-year, $24 million deal to return to the New York Knicks, sources tell ESPN. Shamet's agent, George S. Langberg of GSL Sports Group, worked with Knicks executives on Monday to land the long-term commitment.
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt: Just in: Free agent guard Landry Shamet intends to sign a new four-year, $24 million deal to return to the New York Knicks, sources tell ESPN. Shamet's agent, George S. Langberg of GSL Sports Group, worked with Knicks executives on Monday to land the long-term commitment.
